testsuite.name: com.example.team3Project.domain.product.processing.api.ProductProcessingControllerTest

testcase.name: 소싱 ingest API는 헤더의 사용자 식별값과 payload를 사용해 쿠팡 기준 가공 서비스를 호출한다
소싱 ingest API는 X-User-Id 헤더가 없으면 요청을 거절한다

testsuite.system-out: 2026-05-03T17:59:52.450+09:00 INFO 29406 --- [ Test worker] o.s.mock.web.MockServletContext : Initializing Spring TestDispatcherServlet '' 2026-05-03T17:59:52.450+09:00 INFO 29406 --- [ Test worker] o.s.t.web.servlet.TestDispatcherServlet : Initializing Servlet '' 2026-05-03T17:59:52.450+09:00 INFO 29406 --- [ Test worker] o.s.t.web.servlet.TestDispatcherServlet : Completed initialization in 0 ms 2026-05-03T17:59:52.479+09:00 INFO 29406 --- [ Test worker] o.s.mock.web.MockServletContext : Initializing Spring TestDispatcherServlet '' 2026-05-03T17:59:52.479+09:00 INFO 29406 --- [ Test worker] o.s.t.web.servlet.TestDispatcherServlet : Initializing Servlet '' 2026-05-03T17:59:52.480+09:00 INFO 29406 --- [ Test worker] o.s.t.web.servlet.TestDispatcherServlet : Completed initialization in 0 ms 2026-05-03T17:59:52.481+09:00 WARN 29406 --- [ Test worker] .w.s.m.s.DefaultHandlerExceptionResolver : Resolved [org.springframework.web.bind.MissingRequestHeaderException: Required request header 'X-User-Id' for method parameter type Long is not present]
